items.title: 2026 Preakness Stakes payouts, prize money: What winner, top five horses earned at second Triple Crown race
items.summary: Napoleon Solo took the Preakness crown on Saturday and earned his owner's a $1.2 million purse
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Mourinho completes unbeaten season with Benfica
items.summary: Jose Mourinho completes an unbeaten league season with Benfica but has to settle for third place in the Portuguese top-flight.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Glamorgan seamers prosper on damp day in Birmingham
items.summary: Warwickshire off the pace despite Oliver Hannon-Dalby's second successive five-wicket haul
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
